productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Coral Hex Grey Flip Flop
description: With a soft stimulating footbed and wide straps, these Coral Hex II slippers from reebok give a really cool look. Team them with jeans and tees for a casual look this summer.Upper Wide synthetic leather straps with fabric backing for style and comfort Synthetic leather toe separators for greater comfort Midsole PU footbed with elevated hexagonal pattern for stimulation of the soles and all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal ridge pattern for good grip shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
